text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from a day out,<n>Agnes Digital
and I take a stroll<n>around a park.

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text: Um... Excuse me... Digital...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! I know you! I see you all the<n>time at
Umamusume fan events! Did<n>you come to make
plans for the next<n>one?

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Um... Actually, the truth is... I've been<n>thinking of...
giving up on this life.
choice_data_list: Don't be rash! You've got so much ahead of you!
Don't be rash! You've got so much ahead of you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's not what she means. She'stalking about the simp life! Still...why would you ever want to?

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
There's this school I want to get into,<n>but it's
really competitive. So... I think<n>I have to quit
simping in order to<n>focus on my studies.

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
So... I'd like to entrust all the merch<n>I've acquired
to you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp. To me?

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Well... I just know that you'll take<n>good care of it
all!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Understood. I'll take the<n>merch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: However! And I mean this! I'll takethe merch off your hands, but it'llonly be for a while.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You're not quitting the<n>life! You're
taking time off, is all. Once<n>your studies calm
down, I'll be<n>awaiting your proud return!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I'm not confident I'll ever be<n>able to come
back.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You will. I believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember the time during that<n>cold snap
we both froze our butts off<n>in the standby line for
that merch<n>store?

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
The line for merch is over here.<n>Estimated waiting
time is about one<n>hour.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whooosh, whooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooh... I should've dressed warmer<n>before
coming... Brrr!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Um... I have a heat pad with me,<n>so... we can
take turns, if you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure?! It's my own fault I<n>didn't come
here prepared...

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
But, we're in this together, aren't<n>we?! We both
came here to support<n>our oshis. We'll make it
inside<n>together, come hell or high water!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whooagh! I'm so grateful and happy!<n>Let's show
Mother Nature she won't<n>get the best of us!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. Supporting my oshi<n>gave me
purpose... which is why...

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. It might take me a long,<n>long time, but...
I'll definitely be back!<n>In all my simp glory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Take your time. Remember, us simps<n>are built
strong! We can wait on our<n>knees for hours even
for mere<n>scraps of new deets about our oshis!
choice_data_list: Is this another side to loving Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No kidding! Sometimes we're<n>competing with each
other for event<n>tickets, and other times we're
helping<n>each other support our oshis!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
And sometimes we trade merch<n>when we end up
with duplicates...<n>Interacting with other fans is one
of<n>the many joys to being part of a<n>fandom!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Oh man... I miss it already! Waiting<n>this out is going
to be like living life on<n>super hard mode!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In that case, whenever you need a<n>break from
studying, why not dip your<n>toes back in?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Just hold yourself back a bit and<n>you'll be fine.
What matters most is<n>showing your fave your
love.

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I... I'm going to dedicate<n>myself to my
studies now, but I'll<n>spare some time to keep
supporting<n>my oshis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I'll keep an eye on you when<n>you do to make
sure it doesn't<n>interfere with your studies.
...Welcome<n>back.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two exchange a firm handshake,<n>marking this
astonishingly quick end<n>to the girl's break from
fandom!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh... it wasn't that big a deal. I was<n>just lending a
hand to a comrade. For<n>our precious Umas, there
is still love<n>to offer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What we give doesn't compare to all<n>the delight
they provide for us!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Digital! I knew you were the perfect<n>person to hold
onto my collection.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...By the way, you wouldn't happen to<n>have a
copy of that ultra rare,<n>raffle-only concert DVD in
here, would<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Fangirl
text_block_list.text:
Aha, you have a refined taste! Of<n>course it's in
there. Nyehehe, enjoy it<n>to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You've just made my day! I promise<n>I'll watch it
twice every day—once for<n>both of us!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital displays her firm<n>resolve by vowing
to revere the<n>Umamusume merch for herself and
her fellow fan.
